name: io.github.Lkhanaajav/timeseries-mcp
description: Deterministic time-series statistics for AI agents: anomaly detection, changepoints, decomposition, trend tests, data-quality audits, baseline forecasts. Typed structured output, no code execution.

environment_variables.name: TIMESERIES_MCP_DATA_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Directory CSV loading is sandboxed to (default: server working directory).
